changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE jhi_user ALTER COLUMN id RESTART WITH (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM jhi_user)
ALTER TABLE extended_user ALTER COLUMN id RESTART WITH (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM extended_user)
ALTER TABLE pillar ALTER COLUMN id RESTART WITH (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM pillar)
ALTER TABLE pillar_translation ALTER COLUMN id RESTART WITH (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM pillar_translation)
ALTER TABLE sub_pillar ALTER COLUMN id RESTART WITH (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM sub_pillar)
ALTER TABLE sub_pillar_translation ALTER COLUMN id RESTART WITH (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM sub_pillar_translation)
ALTER TABLE sub_pillar_item ALTER COLUMN id RESTART WITH (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM sub_pillar_item)
ALTER TABLE sub_pillar_item_translation ALTER COLUMN id RESTART WITH (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM sub_pillar_item_translation)
ALTER TABLE life_evaluation ALTER COLUMN id RESTART WITH (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM life_evaluation)
ALTER TABLE evaluation_decision ALTER COLUMN id RESTART WITH (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM evaluation_decision)
ALTER TABLE trip_plan ALTER COLUMN id RESTART WITH (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM trip_plan)
ALTER TABLE trip_plan_step ALTER COLUMN id RESTART WITH (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM trip_plan_step)
